Zen lineage charts

Early Chan patriarchs

Master Chinese Dates Teacher School
Bodhidharma 菩提達摩 d. 536? Prajñātāra Chan
Dazu Huike 大祖慧可 487–593 Bodhidharma Chan
Jianzhi Sengcan 鑑智僧璨 d. 606 Dazu Huike Chan
Dayi Daoxin 大醫道信 580–651 Jianzhi Sengcan Chan
Daman Hongren 大滿弘忍 601–674 Dayi Daoxin Chan

Caodong/Soto lineage

Master Chinese Dates Teacher School
Dongshan Liangjie 洞山良价 807–869 Yunyan Tansheng Caodong
Caoshan Benji 曹山本寂 840–901 Dongshan Liangjie Caodong
